name: callbell-dev
description: Code pack for callbell: a lazy senior developer who builds the simplest working solution, plus a review skill that checks it.

interface.shortDescription: The laziest code that actually works
interface.longDescription: Code pack for callbell. A lazy senior developer in three levels (lite, full, ultra) who asks whether a thing needs to exist before building it, reaches for the standard library and platform before writing custom code, and leaves a runnable check behind. A review skill checks a diff or a whole repo for over-engineering. Requires the callbell core.
defaultPrompt: Build this the laziest way that works.
Check this repo for what I can delete.
